title: ホープフルSの後に・新時代を2人で

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright does a spectacular job in the G1
race. She happily returns, communicating that
she's affirmed her own capabilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Bright and Mejiro Dober discuss their
futures, Mejiro Bright brings up the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both promise to work hard for the Mejiro
name, with Mejiro Bright taking on the Classic
Triple Crown, and Mejiro Dober the Triple Tiara.
